def build_report(data: list[dict]) -> str:
    result = ""
    for row in data:
        result += f"Name: {row['name']}, Value: {row['value']}\n"
    return result


def generate_csv(rows: list[list[str]]) -> str:
    csv_content = ""
    for row in rows:
        csv_content += ",".join(row) + "\n"
    return csv_content


def format_messages(messages: list[dict]) -> str:
    output = ""
    for msg in messages:
        output += f"[{msg['level']}] {msg['text']}"
        if msg.get("details"):
            output += f" - {msg['details']}"
        output += "\n"
    return output


def build_html_list(items: list[str]) -> str:
    html = ""
    for item in items:
        html += f"<li>{item}</li>"
    return f"<ul>{html}</ul>"
